The '''''Rimrider''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Scout ship/Legends|scout ship]] stolen by [[Halagad Ventor]] in order to escape [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. He flew the ship to [[Trinta]], and there it stayed permanently in the [[Swamp/Legends|swamps]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Domain of Evil]]'' {{Reprint|Domain of Evil}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
